info.title: Project-R (DeepQuant) API
info.description: AI-driven algorithmic trading platform with R-Factor market intelligence, Historify data management, quantitative backtesting, and AI-powered trade decisions. Built on Dhan V2 for Indian equity & F&O markets.

tags.name: R-Factor
tags.description: V4 ensemble market intelligence engine. Computes composite R-Factor scores from 8 factors (spread, OI level, futures turnover/volume, options volume, equity trade size, OI change, PCR) using spread-quadratic dominant ensemble.

tags.name: TF Snapshot
tags.description: TradeFinder comparison data. Import and query TradeFinder R-Factor snapshots for model validation.

tags.name: Historify
tags.description: Live trading data, chart data, DuckDB sync, watchlist management, scheduled jobs, settings, and system stats.

tags.name: Backtest
tags.description: Strategy backtesting, TradeFinder validation, and 5-min data download for equity/futures/options.

tags.name: Quant
tags.description: Quantitative analysis: real backtest engine (EMA Crossover, RSI, Dual Momentum, Buy & Hold) and Relative Rotation Graph.

tags.name: AI Trading
tags.description: AI-powered trading decisions using DeepSeek/Claude/GPT. Includes risk management, position tracking, and options analysis.

tags.name: Data Sync
tags.description: Master contracts (Dhan instrument mappings) and NSE bhavcopy data sync. User-triggered only.

tags.name: Market Data
tags.description: Stock lists, OI scanning, option chains, sector analysis, and cache management.

get.description: Bulk R-Factor scanning with mode selection. Supports live (Dhan real-time), past (bhavcopy), or auto mode. Can also compute for a single symbol. Engine preset and robust regression are configurable via query params.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Single stock symbol (e.g., RELIANCE). If provided, returns signal for this symbol only.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Data source mode. `live` = Dhan real-time, `past` = bhavcopy historical, `auto` = system selects best source.

parameters.name: useOC
parameters.description: Include option chain data for PCR computation (live mode only). Rate limited to 1 req/3s per symbol.

parameters.name: stockList
parameters.description: `tf` = TradeFinder paired stocks (~79), `all` = full FnO universe (~206).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Specific date for past mode (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to latest available bhavcopy date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of symbols to scan (auto mode only).

parameters.name: preset
parameters.description: Engine preset. `sq-dominant` = Spread-Quad 90% (default, best TF match). `balanced` = OLS 50% / SQ 30% / Momentum 20%.

parameters.name: robust
parameters.description: Enable Huber robust regression. Penalizes extreme Z-scores. Disabled by default (penalizes high-activity stocks).

503.description: Data not synced — master contracts or bhavcopy sync required

get.description: Three modes: (1) `?symbol=X` — per-symbol R-Factor trend over N days with ADX, Z-scores, raw bhavcopy. (2) `?date=YYYY-MM-DD` — daily leaderboard ranked by R-Factor. (3) `?dates=true` — list available bhavcopy dates.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol for history mode (e.g., RELIANCE)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days of history (symbol mode)

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date for daily leaderboard (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max stocks in leaderboard

parameters.name: dates
parameters.description: Set to `true` to get list of available dates

404.description: Insufficient data for symbol or no data for date

get.description: Three modes: (1) `?dates=true` — available dates with stock counts. (2) `?symbol=X&days=25` — R-Factor history for a symbol. (3) `?date=YYYY-MM-DD` — all stocks ranked by R-Factor for a date.

parameters.name: dates
parameters.description: Set to `true` to list available snapshot dates

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol for history lookup

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days of history

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date for snapshot (YYYY-MM-DD)

post.description: Import TradeFinder R-Factor snapshots. Accepts multiple formats: simple `{ date, stocks }`, ground truth `{ data: { intraday_boost } }`, or payload wrapper format. Supports `replaceDate` to clear existing data before re-import.

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream that bridges Dhan WebSocket quotes to the browser. Includes heartbeat every 30 seconds. Connect via `EventSource`. Automatically cleans up on disconnect.

x-sse-events.tick: Live price tick with OHLCV data from Dhan WebSocket

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Events: `tick` (price data), heartbeat (keep-alive).

post.description: Manage Dhan WebSocket subscriptions for live market feed.

get.summary: Get candle history for live symbol
get.description: Returns historical OHLCV candles for a symbol from the live session.

get.summary: Get OHLCV chart data with indicators
get.description: Returns historical candles with EMA20, EMA50, and RSI indicators computed server-side.
Returns intraday 5-min candles for a specific date with VWAP, EMA20, EMA50, and RSI.

post.description: Download and persist historical candle data from Dhan to DuckDB Parquet storage. Supports single symbol or batch sync.

get.description: Export historical candle data as CSV file download. Columns: Symbol, Exchange, Interval, Timestamp, DateTime_IST, Open, High, Low, Close, Volume.

parameters.name: symbols
parameters.description: Comma-separated symbols

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Candle interval

parameters.name: preset
parameters.description: Date range preset

get.description: Returns last 20 sync activity entries.
Returns current settings with defaults applied.

post.description: Partial update — only provided fields are changed. Values are sanitized and clamped.
Create, delete, toggle, run, or create from template.

get.description: Returns counts for watchlist, master contracts, bhavcopy days, backtest data, storage usage, and last sync date.
Verifies Dhan API connectivity and authentication. Returns latency and masked client ID.

200.description: Available stocks and regimes for backtesting

post.description: Run a simplified backtest simulation with configurable R-Factor parameters and weights.

get.description: Returns row counts for equity, futures, and options 5-min data tables, plus TF trades list.

post.description: Multi-action endpoint for TradeFinder trade validation. Actions: `download` (fetch 5-min data), `status` (check counts), `backtest` (run full backtest), `all-tf-trades` (list all TF trades), `symbol-status` (per-trade data availability), `download-symbols` (specific symbols), `download-all-tf` (all missing), `trade-detail` (analyze single trade), `simulate` (run trade simulation), `tf-trades-list` (paginated trades), `debug` (DuckDB inspection).
Server-Sent Events stream for tracking 5-min data downloads. Reports progress per symbol with events: `progress`, `step-done`, `symbol-done`, `complete`, `error`.

x-sse-events.symbol-done: All data for a symbol downloaded

schema.description: Events: progress, step-done, symbol-done, complete, error

post.description: Execute a backtest with the quantitative engine. Supports EMA Crossover, RSI Accumulation, Dual Momentum, and Buy & Hold 75/25 strategies. Returns equity curve, trades, and performance metrics.

allocation.description: Fraction of capital to deploy per trade

maxDrawdownLimit.description: Max drawdown % to halt trading (0 = disabled)

200.description: Backtest results with equity curve and trades

get.description: Compute RRG data for FnO sectors relative to a benchmark. Returns RS-Ratio and RS-Momentum for each sector with tail history.

parameters.name: tail
parameters.description: Number of historical points per sector

post.description: Analyze stocks using AI (DeepSeek, Claude, GPT). Single symbol or bulk top-N analysis. Returns trade signal with AI decision, entry/SL/target, and risk assessment.

symbol.description: Single stock. Omit for bulk analysis.

topN.description: Top N stocks for bulk analysis

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream with 60-second AI decision cycles. Heartbeat every 30 seconds. Events: `heartbeat`, `status`, `cycle` (full decision), `error`.

x-sse-events.cycle: Complete AI decision cycle result with signals and decisions

get.description: Returns current risk config and defaults.

put.description: Partial update of risk config. Validated: maxCapitalPerTrade 0.5-10%, maxOpenPositions 1-20, minADXThreshold 10-50.

get.description: Returns historical AI trade decisions with optional action filter.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by decision action

post.description: Analyze options opportunities. Picks CE/PE based on R-Factor + ADX signals. Set `reset: true` to clear daily cached pick.

reset.description: Clear daily cached pick and re-analyze

get.description: Browse and search Dhan instrument mappings (symbol -> securityId). Includes lot sizes for volume conversion.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query (symbol or name)

parameters.name: segment
parameters.description: Filter by segment

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Filter by instrument type

post.description: Downloads Dhan's master CSV (~24K rows), filters to EQUITY + FUTSTK + FUTIDX, and stores in SQLite. Required before R-Factor can resolve security IDs.

get.description: Query NSE daily equity + F&O data. Supports symbol search, date filter, and pagination.

post.description: Downloads NSE bhavcopy ZIPs (equity + F&O) for recent trading days. Imports from local JSON cache first, then fetches missing dates from NSE. NSE requires session cookie.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to sync

get.summary: Get stock list with sector data
get.description: Returns FnO stock universe with sector mappings and aggregate sector data. Revalidates every 60 seconds.
Scans open interest data across FnO stocks. Revalidates every 30 seconds.
Returns full option chain for a symbol with per-strike CE/PE data (volume, OI, greeks, IV). Rate limited: 1 request per 3 seconds on Dhan.

parameters.name: expiry
parameters.description: Expiry date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to nearest expiry.

get.description: Sector-level R-Factor aggregation and analysis. Requires master contracts to be synced.

delete.description: Clears all in-memory caches (Dhan response cache, sector cache, etc.).

SignalOutput.description: Complete R-Factor signal with composite score, Z-scores, regime, and model metadata.

isBlastTrade.description: True if R-Factor exceeds blast trade threshold (2.8)

ensembleWeights.description: Weights used if ensemble model was applied

ZScores.description: Z-score normalized values for all 8 factors.

oi_level.description: OI ratio vs 20d avg (>1 = accumulation, <1 = distribution)

MarketRegime.description: Market regime classification based on R-Factor score

TradeSignal.description: Aggregated signal from R-Factor + ADX + live data for AI analysis.

RiskConfig.description: Risk management configuration for AI trading.

fixedProfitTarget.description: INR profit per trade to auto-exit

BhavcopyDay.description: NSE daily equity + F&O data per stock.

ChartIndicators.description: Technical indicators computed for chart data.

BacktestResult.description: Quantitative backtest result with equity curve and trade log.

StrikeData.description: Option chain strike data with CE and PE sides.

OptionSideData.description: Single option side (CE or PE) data.

RFactorPastResponse.title: Past mode response with TF comparison

SyncRequiredError.description: Returned when required data (master contracts or bhavcopy) hasn't been synced yet.

syncTarget.description: Which data source needs to be synced
